athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

horizon_date.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD end date; provide either horizon_date or horizon_days, not both.

horizon_days.description: Optional number of days after start_date to simulate.

include_full.description: When true, include the projected daily CTL/ATL/TSB curve series.

model.description: Closed enum. Free-form physiology models are rejected; this tool only supports deterministic CTL/ATL/TSB impulse-response projection.

planned_daily_loads.description: Optional explicit planned training load values by athlete-local date; these replace modeled ramp load or weekly_plan_targets load for matching dates.

date.description: Athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date after start_date and within the horizon.

training_load.description: Planned daily training load/TSS-equivalent stress for this date.

recovery_week_cadence.description: Every Nth week uses recovery_week_load_pct of modeled load; use 0 to disable recovery weeks.

recovery_week_load_pct.description: Percent of modeled load used during recovery weeks.

start_date.description: Athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date whose get_fitness CTL/ATL/TSB values seed the projection.

weekly_plan_targets.description: Optional weekly training-load/TSS targets copied from get_training_plan or planning context. Each ISO Monday week_start_date is distributed evenly as training_load/7 across projected future dates in that week; partial weeks are not reweighted and planned_daily_loads override exact dates.

training_load.description: Weekly target training load/TSS-equivalent stress; the projection uses training_load/7 for each covered day unless planned_daily_loads overrides it.

week_start_date.description: Athlete-local ISO Monday YYYY-MM-DD week anchor. The target week must overlap projected days after start_date.

weekly_ramp_pct.description: Week-over-week percent change applied to modeled daily load when planned_daily_loads does not specify a day.
